# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"

---
# Service Account for API Gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway

---
# Service Account for Backend Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service

---
# Service Account for Auth Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service

---
# Service Account for Database Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service

---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"
    config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: ""
    config.linkerd.io/skip-inbound-ports: ""
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "443"
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"

---
# API Gateway Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP

---
# Backend Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
      labels:
        app: backend-service
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-service
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: backend-service
          image: backend-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"

---
# Backend Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP

---
# Auth Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
  labels:
    app: auth-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
      labels:
        app: auth-service
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: auth-service
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: auth-service
          image: auth-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"

---
# Auth Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: auth-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP

---
# Database Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "5432"
      labels:
        app: database-service
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-service
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: database-service
          image: database-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: "64Mi"

---
# Database Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP

---
# ============================================================
# Linkerd Server Policies - Define how each server accepts traffic
# ============================================================

# Server policy for API Gateway HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for API Gateway HTTPS port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-https
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: https
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server policy for Backend Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Backend Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-service-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# Server policy for Auth Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Database Service HTTP port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-service-http
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
# Server policy for Database Service Postgres port (opaque/TCP)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-service-postgres
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  port: postgres
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
# ============================================================
# Mesh TLS Authentication - Only allow meshed (mTLS) clients
# ============================================================

# MeshTLSAuthentication: require mTLS identity from within the mesh
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-authenticated
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for Backend Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: backend-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "backend-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for Auth Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: auth-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "auth-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# Specific identity for Database Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: database-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "database-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"

---
# ============================================================
# Authorization Policies - Fine-grained access control
# ============================================================

# Default deny-all policy for the namespace
# This ensures no unauthenticated traffic is allowed
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny policy - all traffic must be explicitly authorized"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: microservices
  requiredAuthenticationRefs: []

---
# Allow API Gateway to receive traffic from any meshed client in the namespace
# (e.g., ingress controller that is also meshed)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-ingress
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Allow meshed traffic to reach the API Gateway"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mesh-authenticated

---
# Allow API Gateway HTTPS from meshed clients
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-https
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Allow meshed HTTPS traffic to API Gateway"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-https
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: mesh-authenticated

---
# Allow only API Gateway to access Backend Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-backend-http
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only API Gateway can access Backend Service via HTTP"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-gateway-identity

---
# Allow only API Gateway to access Backend Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-backend-grpc
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only API Gateway can access Backend Service via gRPC"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-service-grpc
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-gateway-identity

---
# Allow API Gateway and Backend Service to access Auth Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-backend-to-auth
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "API Gateway and Backend Service can access Auth Service"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: auth-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-gateway-identity
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-service-identity

---
# Allow only Backend Service to access Database Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-to-database-http
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only Backend Service can access Database Service HTTP"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-service-identity

---
# Allow only Backend Service to access Database Service Postgres
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-to-database-postgres
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only Backend Service can access Database Service Postgres port"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-service-postgres
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-service-identity

---
# ============================================================
# HTTP Routes - Fine-grained path-based authorization
# ============================================================

# HTTP Route for Backend Service health checks
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-service-health
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: Server
      name: backend-service-http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /ready
          method: GET

---
# HTTP Route for Backend Service API endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-service-api
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: Server
      name: backend-service-http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/

---
# Authorization for Backend API routes - only from API Gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-backend-api
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only API Gateway can access Backend API routes"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: backend-service-api
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-gateway-identity

---
# HTTP Route for Auth Service authentication endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: auth-service-authenticate
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: Server
      name: auth-service-http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /auth/
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /validate-token
          method: POST

---
# HTTP Route for Auth Service admin endpoints - restricted
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: auth-service-admin
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: Server
      name: auth-service-http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /admin/

---
# Only API Gateway can access Auth admin endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-gateway-to-auth-admin
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only API Gateway can access Auth Service admin endpoints"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: auth-service-admin
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-gateway-identity

---
# HTTP Route for Database Service data endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: database-service-data
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-service
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: Server
      name: database-service-http
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /data/
          method: GET
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /data/
          method: POST
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /data/
          method: PUT
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /data/
          method: DELETE

---
# Only Backend Service can access Database data routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-backend-to-database-data
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Only Backend Service can access Database data endpoints"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: database-service-data
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: backend-service-identity

---
# ============================================================
# Network Policies - Defense in depth at the network layer
# ============================================================

# Default deny all ingress in the namespace
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

---
# Allow DNS resolution for all pods
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-dns
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
  egress:
    - to: []
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53

---
# Allow Linkerd control plane communication
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-linkerd-control-plane
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"

---
# API Gateway network policy
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app.kubernetes.io/name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9090
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: auth-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082

---
# Backend Service network policy
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8081
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 9090
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: auth-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: database-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8083
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432

---
# Auth Service network policy
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: auth-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8082
  egress: []

---
# Database Service network policy - most restrictive
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: database-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8083
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432
  egress: []

---
# ============================================================
# Service Profiles - Retry budgets and timeouts
# ============================================================

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: backend-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: "GET /api/v1/{resource}"
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: "/api/v1/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 10s
    - name: "POST /api/v1/{resource}"
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: "/api/v1/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 15s
    - name: "PUT /api/v1/{resource}/{id}"
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: "/api/v1/[^/]+/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 15s
    - name: "DELETE /api/v1/{resource}/{id}"
      condition:
        method: DELETE
        pathRegex: "/api/v1/[^/]+/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: "GET /healthz"
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: "/healthz"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: "GET /ready"
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: "/ready"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: auth-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: "POST /auth/login"
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: "/auth/login"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: "POST /validate-token"
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: "/validate-token"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: "POST /auth/refresh"
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: "/auth/refresh"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: "GET /healthz"
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: "/healthz"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: database-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: "GET /data/{collection}"
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: "/data/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 15s
    - name: "POST /data/{collection}"
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: "/data/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 20s
    - name: "PUT /data/{collection}/{id}"
      condition:
        method: PUT
        pathRegex: "/data/[^/]+/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 20s
    - name: "DELETE /data/{collection}/{id}"
      condition:
        method: DELETE
        pathRegex: "/data/[^/]+/[^/]+"
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 15s
    - name: "GET /healthz"
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: "/healthz"
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s
